title: 3DTILES_implicit_tiling
description: Implicit tiling defines a concise representation of quadtrees and octrees in 3D Tiles.

contentUri.description: Template URI for locating content files.
contentUri.gltf_detailedDescription: A template URI pointing to tile content. It contains placeholders `{level}`, `{x}`, `{y}`, and optionally `{z}` (for OCTREE subdivision scheme) that are substituted with a tile's coordinate to resolve the actual file. Example: `content/{level}/{x}/{y}.glb`.

subtreeUri.description: Template URI for locating subtree files.
subtreeUri.gltf_detailedDescription: A template URI pointing to subtree files. It contains placeholders `{level}`, `{x}`, `{y}`, and optionally `{z}` (for OCTREE subdivision scheme) that are substituted with a subtree's coordinate to resolve the actual file. Example: `subtrees/{level}/{x}/{y}.json`.

subdivisionScheme.description: Either QUADTREE or OCTREE. See Subdivision scheme.

availableLevels.description: How many levels there are in the tree with available tiles.

subtreeLevels.description: How many levels there are in each subtree.
